title: AutoCAD MCP source-reviewed capability benchmark
methodology: Public source, documented behavior, and locally recorded test evidence scored with a fixed 100-point rubric. Repository stars and raw tool counts do not score points.

projects.note: Dual COM/ezdxf backends, paper space, ISO 129/286/1101 annotation, closed-loop quality gates, auditable delivery; v1.4 adds CI matrix incl. Windows, PyPI packaging, and a version A/B correctness gate (21/21, 0 regressions).
Broad backend and CAD coverage with layout and xref depth.
Atomic operations, postconditions, 3D tools, and verified artifact delivery.
TABLE/MLEADER, data exchange, multi-document workflows, and alternative CAD support.
AutoCAD LT file IPC, ezdxf, P&ID workflows, leaders, and screenshots.
.NET main-thread integration with a broad live AutoCAD operation surface.

Very broad live-AutoCAD operation surface with CAD-IR understanding, visual grounding, and guarded CADPlan dry-run/rollback; COM-only (no headless lane), no standards-based generators or toleranced annotation.
Multi-CAD reach (AutoCAD/GstarCAD/ZWCAD) over Windows COM with a small basic drawing surface; no verification, transactions, tests, or delivery evidence documented.
Basic COM drawing tool set with SQLite persistence; reviewed from the documented tool surface only, execution path not exercised locally.
